meta.incident: A follower falls behind, the ISR for partition events-7 shrinks 1,2,3 -> 1, dropping below min.insync.replicas=2; produces fail with NotEnoughReplicasException and the partition goes under-replicated — amid a recurring socket-server distractor. Bracketed comma-millis timestamp.

ground_truth.desc: ISR contracting as a follower lags

evidence.text: [2026-05-04 14:00:05,880] WARN [SocketServer listenerType=ZK_BROKER] Unexpected error from /<ip>; closing connection (org.apache.kafka.common.network.Selector)
[2026-05-04 14:00:11,402] WARN [ReplicaManager broker=1] Shrinking ISR from 1,2,3 to 1,2 for partition events-7. Leader: (highWatermark: 90412) (kafka.server.ReplicaManager)
[2026-05-04 14:00:13,665] WARN [SocketServer listenerType=ZK_BROKER] Unexpected error from /<ip>; closing connection (org.apache.kafka.common.network.Selector)

[2026-05-04 14:00:15,930] ERROR [ReplicaFetcher replicaId=3, leaderId=1, fetcherId=0] Error for partition events-7: org.apache.kafka.common.errors.NotLeaderOrFollowerException (kafka.server.ReplicaFetcherThread)
[2026-05-04 14:00:18,193] WARN [ReplicaManager broker=1] Shrinking ISR from 1,2 to 1 for partition events-7. Leader: (highWatermark: 90420) (kafka.server.ReplicaManager)

[2026-05-04 14:00:20,455] ERROR [ReplicaManager broker=1] Error processing append operation on partition events-7: org.apache.kafka.common.errors.NotEnoughReplicasException: Number of insync replicas for partition events-7 is 1, below required minimum 2 (kafka.server.ReplicaManager)
[2026-05-04 14:00:22,718] WARN [Partition events-7 broker=1] Partition events-7 is now under-replicated, isr=1 (kafka.cluster.Partition)
[2026-05-04 14:00:25,980] ERROR [KafkaApi-1] Error when handling request: produce to events-7 failed with NotEnoughReplicasException (kafka.server.KafkaApis)

top_templates.pattern: <*> WARN [SocketServer listenerType=ZK_BROKER] Unexpected error from /<ip>; closing connection (org.apache.kafka.common.network.Selector)
<*> WARN [ReplicaManager broker=1] Shrinking ISR from <*> to <*> for partition events-7. Leader: (highWatermark: <*> (kafka.server.ReplicaManager)
